interaction_phrase: collaborative research with QC Ware's algorithms experts
occurrence_sentence: IDC found that Aisin was able to begin understanding the potential of quantum computing for improving their manufacturing operations beyond traditional methods. They have subsequently initiated two POCs, thanks to the collaborative research with QC Ware's algorithms experts.
